# Yohaku Companion v1.8.1

## Highlights

- Stops publishing media immediately when playback is paused, so menu-bar Presence and Live Desk no longer retain a paused track.

## Fixes and reliability

- Corrected QQ Music playback detection when its player-specific session leaves a stale positive playback rate after pausing.
- Reconciles the authoritative system playback state with player-specific metadata, preserving enriched track details without reporting a paused session as playing.

## Update notes

- No pairing or settings migration is required for this update.
